_doc: Frozen base-model baselines for the gc-heldout suite, keyed by base+quant family
('<base_family>/<quant>'). ADDITIVE GROWTH ONLY: a family record is measured on the
served base handle by docs/runbooks/gc-heldout-baseline-run.md (K=3 reps per task),
added here, and covered by the scope-doc freeze. baseline_solved = median of the
3 rep solved counts (PROPOSED value, gc-heldout-suite-scope.md). A candidate whose
family has no record here is BLOCKED from grading — never cross-family compared

integrity-fixture/NONE.note: synthetic instrument for the verifier-integrity battery ONLY; never a grading target; demonstrates the floor mechanics against a known solved count
